prestazioni: Installation of a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 56mm compressor wheel) on the **LE5 2.0L Ecotec direct-injection engine**, paired with a **Custom Fabrication Solutions (CFS) cast-aluminum turbo manifold** (equal-length, T3 flange) to support 28psi of boost with a **TurboSmart Comp-Gate40 wastegate** (external, 40mm) for precise boost control. Requires **Mafia Performance 3.5" stainless steel downpipe** with **Vibrant 1799 ultra-quiet resonator** to eliminate turbo lag while maintaining exhaust flow efficiency.

Full **LE5 engine internals upgrade** with **Manley forged pistons (8.5:1 compression, 2618 alloy)** and **Crower forged H-beam connecting rods (4340 steel, 156mm length)** to handle 500whp reliably. Paired with a **Brian Crower Stage 3 camshaft (224°/230° duration, 0.472"/0.480" lift, 114° LSA)** and **Ferrea Competition Series valves (intake: 36mm, exhaust: 31mm, titanium retainers)** for optimized airflow. **ARP head studs (2000 series, 12-point)** and **Cometic MLS head gasket (0.051" thickness)** ensure sealing under extreme cylinder pressures.

**Fuel system overhaul** with **ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min, ethanol-compatible)** and **AEM 340lph in-tank fuel pump** to support E85 blends. **Hondata KPro ECU reflash** (custom LE5 calibration) with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor (30-0334)** for real-time AFR monitoring. **Mishimoto aluminum radiator (direct-fit, dual-core)** and **Setrab 19-row oil cooler (19501)** prevent heat soak under track conditions.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Solstice GXP-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and duckbill spoiler)** with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (2080 series)** and **Vortex Generators (AeroCatch, 3mm height)** on the rear decklid for improved high-speed stability. **Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM-style, 30% weight reduction)** with **custom heat extractor vents (3" diameter, CNC-machined aluminum)** to reduce underhood temps.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9 +25 front, 18x10 +35 rear, 5x110 PCD)** in **Gunmetal Bronze finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)** for maximum mechanical grip. **D2 Racing coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8kg/mm front springs, 10kg/mm rear springs)** with **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** and **Polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension, full set)** for razor-sharp handling.

**Custom interior overhaul** featuring **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara inserts)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2)** and **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub)**. **AEM CD-7 dash (7" touchscreen, CAN bus integration)** replaces the stock cluster, displaying **real-time boost, AFR, oil pressure, and lap timers**. **Custom roll cage (Chromoly 4130, 6-point, bolt-in)** by **The Driveshaft Shop** for structural rigidity and safety.
